title: Implement reviewed one-task Cabinet import
goal: Allow Bureau to import exactly one reviewed Cabinet Frontier candidate as a Bureau task through an explicit apply gate, without dispatching or merging.

metadata.safety_boundary: reviewed one-task registry import only; no automatic import, no queue mutation, no dispatch, no merge, no runtime mutation, no completion authority
metadata.authority_model: Task creation can become allowed only for an explicit apply command after a valid review receipt; dispatch and queue mutation remain separately gated.
metadata.outcome: Bureau PR #206 added explicit reviewed Cabinet Frontier import. It requires a ready-for-design review receipt bound to the exact Frontier candidate, defaults to dry-run, creates exactly one registry task file only with --apply, rejects task ID collisions, queue collisions, source re-import collisions, missing initiatives and invalid task schemas, and preserves no-dispatch/no-queue/no-runtime/no-merge boundaries.

verified_acceptance.review-required: Import requires a cabinet_frontier_review_receipt with decision ready-for-design and sourceCandidateId matching an admissible reader report candidate.
verified_acceptance.exclusive-task-create: Apply writes exactly one registry task file using exclusive create and rejects existing task IDs/files.
verified_acceptance.no-dispatch: Receipts record dispatchAllowed false and dispatchPerformed false; no runtime, merge, push or completion effect is created.
verified_acceptance.collision-check: Import checks registry task IDs, queue IDs and existing source_frontier_candidate_id metadata before apply.
verified_acceptance.existing-promotion-surface: Implementation keeps existing cabinet_promotion_write behavior tested and uses the same reviewed-import boundary for Frontier JSONL.

checks: Bureau PR #206 validate (3.10) SUCCESS before merge
Bureau PR #206 validate (3.12) SUCCESS before merge
local: ruff check src tests pyproject.toml OK
local: focused cabinet frontier reader and cabinet promotion write tests OK

acceptance.assertion: Import requires a valid Bureau review receipt bound to the exact source candidate.
Apply creates exactly one registry task file with exclusive create and rejects duplicates.
Import does not dispatch agents, mutate runtime, merge, push or mark work done.
Import checks existing tasks and queue for duplicate source fingerprints or target collisions.
Implementation reuses, extends or explicitly supersedes src/bureau/cabinet_promotion_write.py before adding or changing import behavior.
